claim: AI is fundamentally changing organizational structures, requiring companies to reorganize teams and workflows to accommodate AI-augmented processes
actionable: Review your organization's team structure and responsibilities in light of AI capabilities; identify roles that need restructuring or upskilling
source_title: How to Reorg After AI Changes Everything | Block's Owen Jennings on the a16z Show

claim: Enterprise leaders need to develop new mental models for how AI augments human work rather than purely replacing it
actionable: Adopt a mindset that views AI as augmenting team capabilities rather than only as a replacement tool when planning organizational changes
source_title: How to Reorg After AI Changes Everything | Block's Owen Jennings on the a16z Show
